title: Carson Block Is Rethinking Indian Fund Plan With Focus on AI
description: Carson Block said artificial intelligence is a key reason Muddy Waters Capital LLC is rethinking plans for a long-short fund in India, saying his firm is “going back to the lab” on the idea.
content:
Carson Block said artificial intelligence is a key reason Muddy Waters Capital LLC is rethinking plans for a long-short fund in India, saying his firm is “going back to the lab” on the idea.

title: Pope Leo XIV Calls for Global Treaty to Restrict Autonomous Weapons in New Encyclical
description: Pope Leo XIV on Monday released his first encyclical, titled “Magnifica Humanitas,” calling for a global treaty to restrict the use of artificial intelligence in warfare. The 42,000-word document warns against delegating lethal decisions to autonomous systems and urges world leaders to “disarm” AI technology. The pontiff presented the encyclical at a Vatican press conference […]

title: AI chiefs walk back job apocalypse warnings
description: The most prominent figures in artificial intelligence are stepping back from dire predictions about mass unemployment, as the industry faces growing public hostility over AI's promised transformation of the workplace.
content:

title: UK cyberspying chief calls AI 'an unstoppable force' and warns about Russia
description: Artificial intelligence is "an unstoppable force" that is being weaponised in ways that fall just short of traditional warfare, the UK cyberspying chief warned Wednesday.
content:
BLETCHLEY: Artificial intelligence is "an unstoppable force” that is being weaponised in ways that fall just short of traditional warfare, the UK cyberspying chief warned Wednesday.

title: US Stock Market: Goldman Sachs raises S&P 500 target to 8,000 on AI-driven earnings optimism
description: Goldman Sachs has boosted its S&P 500 target for 2026 to 8,000. This optimistic outlook is driven by strong corporate earnings and continued investment in artificial intelligence. The firm anticipates robust profit growth, with AI-related companies expected to be major contributors. This revision reflects growing confidence in the US stock market's future performance.

title: One Tech Tip: Your next job interview could be with an AI bot
description: Applying for a new job? You might be interviewed by artificial intelligence. Recruiters, overwhelmed by AI-generated job applications, are using chatbots, mainly for initial screenings.
content:
Have you applied for a new job? If you’ve been shortlisted, get ready to be interviewed by artificial intelligence.

title: 'My job is going': UK workers squeezed out by AI
description: When a client asked her a year ago to design a glossary to train an artificial intelligence system, translator Jessica Spengler realised she was going to train her own replacement.
content:

title: ABC managing director Hugh Marks defends AI radio news trial
description: The ABC trialled using artificial intelligence to rewrite radio news bulletins for online, a Senate estimates hearing has been told.
content:
ABC managing director Hugh Marks has defended an artificial intelligence trial that translates radio content into a digital format.

title: generated shows for children
description: Amazon MGM Studios announced Wednesday it has greenlit the first three children's shows that were created under a new initiative to use artificial intelligence (AI) in content development. AI Studios chief at Amazon MGM Albert Cheng told the conference that the technology won't eliminate jobs, it will actually reduce costs and timelines to make it possible to increase the number of productions.

title: AI's role in medicine and how much we can rely on it
description: Artificial intelligence, or AI, has long been used in the medical field to read imaging results such as X-rays and CT scans. This form of AI differs from AI-based large language models (LLMs) like ChatGPT. Two doctors in Australia discuss the role of AI in healthcare and how much the general public can rely on LLMs for their health needs.
